commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
The PR changes Codex doctor route repair to preserve explicit non-default `agentRuntime` pins when migrating legacy `openai-codex/*` model-map entries, adds regression tests, and updates the changelog.

Reproducibility: yes. Current-main source shows the legacy/canonical spread-merge path that can overwrite the PI pin, and the linked source PR supplies terminal before/after output using production `maybeRepairCodexRoutes` on the reported config.
commands.review_followup: No repair lane is needed; the PR has no blocking review finding and can proceed through the existing automerge/check gate.

target.title: fix(doctor): preserve explicit agentRuntime pin during codex model migration [AI-assisted]
